title: book-learning-skill
description: An Agent Skill for systematic book learning: convert PDF/EPUB/Word/HTML into Markdown, preserve chapter structure, generate traceable chapter notes, layered summaries, and atomic knowledge cards.

title: Number-guess
description: Number Guessing Game is a simple program where the computer generates a random number and the user tries to guess it. The program gives hints like “too high” or “too low” after each attempt. It helps beginners understand loops, conditions, and basic logic in programming while making learning interactive and fun.

title: ai-agents-learning-lab
description: 🤖 Explore AI agents from the ground up, mastering supervised, reinforcement, and autonomous learning to achieve tasks and objectives effectively.

title: Label-Free-RLVR
description: 📚 Explore a curated collection of research on Label-Free Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for enhancing Large Language Models.

title: ai-smart-tire-intelligence
description: 🛞 Analyze tire performance and improve safety with our integrated dashboard utilizing advanced data analytics and machine learning techniques.

title: Emotional-aware-learning-enhancement-tool
description: Emotional Aware Learning Enhancement Tool using ,python and mysql databases.It aimed to automate classroom attendance using facial recognition.I worked on managing frontend UI design and handled face detection module.The outcome was a prototype that achieved over 90% face detection accuracy in controlled condition.

title: Diamond-Price-Prediction
description: "An End-to-End Machine Learning application to automate diamond valuation. Built with modular pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and model training, served via a Flask REST API."

title: john-yeo-swift-framework
description: SWIFT Framework — Interactive learning system for PAC tutors

title: RoommateSync
description: RoomMateSync is a web-based roommate matching system that uses machine learning algorithms (K-Means, KNN, and cosine similarity) to recommend compatible roommates based on user preferences and lifestyle data. The platform integrates frontend, backend, and a structured database to enable efficient user profiling and scalable, data-driven matching.

title: ITeducationroadmap
description: This repo tracks my transition into IT. I used AI to design a roadmap of core concepts to ensure I'm focusing on the right areas. I'm highly motivated to turn theoretical knowledge into practical, hands-on skills. Always learning, coachable, and completely open to feedback!
